mapper.select: select r.role_code from beyeah_admin_user_role ur join beyeah_admin_role r on r.role_id = ur.role_id and r.is_deleted = 0 where ur.admin_user_id = #{adminUserId}

select distinct p.permission_code from beyeah_admin_user_role ur join beyeah_admin_role_permission rp on rp.role_id = ur.role_id join beyeah_admin_permission p on p.permission_id = rp.permission_id and p.is_deleted = 0 where ur.admin_user_id = #{adminUserId}
